# Preface {.unnumbered}
These are notes for STAT 3113 Regression {{< var course.year >}} {{< var course.semester >}} at Arkansas Tech University. If you have any questions please contact me through [email](mailto:xxiao@atu.edu).




- Week 1–2: Linear + Ridge/Lasso + PCR/PLS
- Week 3: Logistic + LDA/QDA
- Week 4: KNN + nonparametric ideas
- Week 5: Trees + Ensembles
- Week 6: Clustering







## References {.unnumbered}

::: {#refs}
:::
